headline: How The Insulet (PODD) Narrative Is Shifting After Omnipod 5 Correction And Repriced Expectations
summary: Insulet’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$340.26 to US$326.35, indicating a more conservative price target in the updated analysis. This adjustment aligns with the mixed analyst commentary around the Omnipod 5 device correction, competitive pressure in insulin patch pumps, and a broader spread of ratings from Buy through to Underweight. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets contribute to the evolving narrative around risk, opportunity, and key factors to...

headline: Jim Cramer on Insulet Corporation: “It’s Still Too Expensive Because of the GLP-1 Threat”
summary: Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he suggested investors balance portfolios with hot and cold stocks. Toward the end of the lightning round, a caller sought Cramer’s opinion of the stock, and he said: Insulet is the stock in the healthcare group. It is the biggest decline of any stock […]
